problem id: 0e70c867
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(4) XOR SHR(5)) AND ROT(2)

examples:
  01010011 -> 00000000
  00111100 -> 11000000
  00001100 -> 00000000
  10110101 -> 01010100
  00111101 -> 11010000
  00111110 -> 11100000
  11101001 -> 10000111

query: 10010110
predicted answer: 01000000
